description: Modular scene assembly system for tattoo industry imagery — workspace, spatial depth, tool layout, contamination, and obstruction logic

terms: black matte workstation
stainless steel table
carbon texture surface
clinical white laminate
rubber anti-slip mat
wooden desk surface
metal utility cart
black acrylic sheet
glass top table
plastic foldable table
leather tool mat
adjustable clinic bed surface
armrest vinyl cushion
paper-covered workbench
industrial steel surface

desk_cover.description: Disposable or reusable cover layer on workspace — extremely high industry signal value
terms: black dental bib — single-use paper bib, standard in tattoo studios
plastic barrier wrap — transparent cling film covering surface
paper towel layering — multiple paper towels spread as work surface
medical protective sheet — blue or white disposable medical sheet
wrinkled workstation cover — used, creased cover showing prior work
used disposable cover — visibly contaminated single-use cover
clean clinical drape — fresh, unwrinkled medical drape
stencil paper scatter — torn stencil paper pieces on surface
ink-stained paper towel — paper towel with absorbed ink residue
gauze pad layer — sterile gauze padding on work area
plastic-backed absorbent pad — blue absorbent puppy pad style
no cover — bare surface, no protective layer

table_obstruction.description: Spatial occlusion of worktable structure — real photos rarely show full table
terms: partial table visibility — only portion of table visible in frame
foreground obstruction — object in foreground blocking table edge
cropped workstation edge — table edge cut by frame boundary
hidden support structure — table legs/undercarriage not visible
shallow framing obstruction — tight crop hides table boundaries
overhead flat lay — full table visible from above, no edge crop
workstation corner visible — just the corner of table in frame
table edge entering frame — table edge enters from one side
full table in frame — entire table surface visible
no table visible — product suspended, no surface context

tool_layout.description: Arrangement of tools and equipment on the workspace
terms: ink caps scattered naturally — multiple ink caps spread across surface
machine cable crossing frame — cable of machine diagonally across image
paper towel partially folded — folded or crumpled paper towel
gloves resting beside machine — used or unused gloves adjacent to machine
clip cord entering frame edge — clip cord comes from outside frame
organized tool row — tools arranged in neat line
machine resting on surface — tattoo machine placed flat on table
bottle in background — ink or spray bottle visible behind main subject
power supply visible — battery pack or power supply in frame
cartridge box nearby — opened cartridge packaging visible
multi-ink-cap arrangement — several ink caps arranged in row or cluster
single ink cap focus — single ink cap as main subject element
needle wrapper present — sterile needle packaging in frame
remote control visible — machine remote or foot pedal visible
phone in frame — phone or camera as work documentation tool

contamination_level.description: Visible wear, residue, and workflow state of the workspace
terms: clean organized setup — pristine, freshly arranged workspace
slightly messy workflow — natural light disorganization during work
ink residue marks — visible ink stains on surface or cover
paper towel contamination — used paper towel with ink/blood
used workstation realism — realistic post-work state
freshly cleaned setup — disinfected, reset workspace
heavy ink splatter — significant ink marks on surface
blood trace visible — tiny blood spots on towel or surface
vaseline smear — vaseline residue reflecting light
stencil residue — purple/green stencil ink marks remaining
glove powder residue — white powder dust on surface

spatial_depth.description: Depth layering and spatial arrangement within the frame
terms: single layer flat lay — all elements in one depth plane, top-down
two-layer depth — foreground subject + background context
multi-layer workspace — 3+ depth layers visible
deep table perspective — table receding into distance
shallow table crop — tight on surface, minimal depth
product suspended — no surface contact, floating depth
hand in mid-ground — hand or glove between camera and product
wall background depth — wall visible behind table surface
tool barrier depth — tools creating visual depth layers
machine hovering above surface — machine held, not resting

realism_behavior.description: Visual realism signals specific to tattoo workspaces
terms: surface contamination texture — visible dirt/residue on surface
fingerprint on wrap — smudges on barrier film
cable tension visible — stretched cable indicating real setup
uneven table covering — cover not perfectly flat, real wrinkle
asymmetrical tool placement — tools not perfectly arranged
reflection on metal surface — ambient reflection on machine
shadow from overhead — real cast shadow from above lighting
glove crinkle texture — visible wrinkles in glove material
moisture on surface — dampness or liquid on table
lint or dust particles — tiny particles visible in macro

workflow_state.description: Phase of the tattooing workflow implied by the scene
terms: preparation setup — tools being arranged before work
mid-workflow — active tattooing in progress
wipe stage — wiping excess ink during work
post-work documentation — photographing finished work
cleanup phase — removing used materials
maintenance — cleaning machine, changing grips
product photography — staged product shot, not active work
teaching / demonstration — multiple tools arranged for demo

spatial_realism.description: Advanced spatial occlusion and framing realism signals

foreground_obstruction: arm or hand partially blocking view
partial_visibility: ink cap half visible at edge
focus_falloff: soft edges from shallow depth of field
